data.body:
=== RESEARCH REPORT ===
=== DSO: agents/ + shared reviewers safety-net sweep
=== agent ade9d6e995f6a3394

I now have comprehensive coverage of all evaluation/review dimensions. The `red-test-writer` carries an acceptance/rejection rubric (it evaluates its own tests against behavioral criteria), and `story-decomposer` carries an SC-coverage verdict scheme and INVEST check. I have all the data needed.

I also need the bloat-blue-team confidence note already captured (≥80%/≤20%). Let me compile the final exhaustive report now. I have read or extracted every reviewer/critic/evaluator agent and all shared review machinery.

---

# SAFETY-NET SWEEP: Exhaustive Reviewer Dimension Inventory

Scope covered: `~/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/agents/` (all 54 agent files + `agents/ci/` mirror) and `skills/shared/` review machinery (`reviewers/`, `prompts/`, `docs/reviewers/`, `workflows/`). Brainstorm/preplanning/implementation-plan SKILL.md files deliberately untouched. **Every dimension listed separately, no dedup.** Citations are file:line; deep code-reviewer base lines (1–585) are byte-identical across all four `code-reviewer-deep-*` files and both security files share that heavy base.

---

## PART A — COMPLEXITY-EVALUATOR (full enumeration, as requested)

**Agent:** `agents/complexity-evaluator.md` (model: haiku). Tier vocabulary set by `tier_schema` arg: **`TRIVIAL`** (default, story-level → outputs TRIVIAL/MODERATE/COMPLEX) or **`SIMPLE`** (epic-level → SIMPLE/MODERATE/COMPLEX). Defaults to TRIVIAL when unspecified (`:14-19`).

**The 8 dimensions** (`:76-189`):

1. **Dimension 1 — Files** (`:80-88`): est. source files to change excl. tests. Thresholds: **≤1 → TRIVIAL/SIMPLE; 2–3 → MODERATE; >3 → COMPLEX**.
2. **Dimension 2 — Layers** (`:90-101`): distinct architectural layers (Route/Blueprint | Service/DocumentProcessor | Agent/Node | LLM Provider/Client | Formatter | DB/SQLAlchemy Model | Migration; skill/prompt/script/doc files = **0 layers**). Thresholds: **≤1 → TRIVIAL/SIMPLE; 2 → MODERATE; ≥3 → COMPLEX**.
3. **Dimension 3 — Interfaces** (`:103-110`): public method/Protocol/ABC signature changes (internal-only don't count). **0 → neutral; ≥1 → FORCES COMPLEX**.
4. **Dimension 4 — scope_certainty** (`:112-154`): completeness of spec. Absent/blank/unrecognized `type` → **Low → COMPLEX** (`:116`). Per-type rubrics: **bug** (High = clear repro + bounded fix + stated post-fix behavior; Medium = repro unclear OR fix scope uncertain; Low = vague/repro unknown/spans unknown layers, `:118-124`); **story/epic** (High = AC testable-before-coding + named paths/interfaces + measurable done; Medium = goal clear but AC implicit; Low = ambiguous/AC absent/business-only, `:138-143`). Worked examples B-1/B-2/B-3 and F-1/F-2/F-3 (`:126-154`).
5. **Dimension 5 — Confidence** (`:156-164`): **High** = specific files found via Grep/Glob + layer boundaries verified; **Medium** = description-only / couldn't locate files. Skipping Step 2 file search → defaults Medium → forces COMPLEX (`:50`).
6. **Dimension 6 — Blast Radius** (`:165-174`): from `blast-radius-score.py` (Step 2.5). `complex_override=false`/absent → other dims govern; **`complex_override=true` → FORCES COMPLEX**. High numeric `blast_radius_score` w/ override false = informational only.
7. **Dimension 7 — Pattern Familiarity** (`:176-184`): **High** = pattern in 2+ existing repo implementations; **Medium** = common in ecosystem, novel to repo; **Low** = no precedent anywhere.
8. **Dimension 8 — External Boundary Count** (`:186-188`): count of external systems/tools/APIs/services. Zero = strong signal against COMPLEX.

**Classification rules** (`:194-198`): TRIVIAL/SIMPLE = ALL of {files≤1, layers≤1, interfaces=0, scope_certainty=High, confidence=High}; MODERATE = ALL of {files≤3, layers≤2, interfaces=0, scope_certainty∈{High,Medium}, confidence=High} AND no COMPLEX qualifier; COMPLEX = ANY of {files>3, layers≥3, interfaces≥1, scope_certainty=Low, confidence=Medium on a TRIVIAL/MODERATE estimate}.

**Promotion rules** (`:200-206`): TRIVIAL/SIMPLE + scope_certainty Medium → MODERATE; confidence Medium on any TRIVIAL/SIMPLE/MODERATE → COMPLEX; scope_certainty Low → COMPLEX (always); interfaces≥1 → COMPLEX (always); blast `complex_override=true` → COMPLEX (always).

**manifest_depth mapping** (`:210-220`): TRIVIAL/SIMPLE → `minimal`; MODERATE → `standard`; COMPLEX → `deep`.

**Epic-only Qualitative Override dimensions** (apply ONLY for epics / `tier_schema=SIMPLE`; each FORCES COMPLEX, `:224-237`): **Multiple personas** (>1 user role); **UI + backend** (BOTH template/CSS AND service/model); **New DB migration**; **Foundation/enhancement candidate** ("works" vs "works well" split); **External integration** (new external API/service/infra/library w/ no existing usage); **Success criteria overflow** (**>6 SC**; norm 3–6).
**Done-Definition Check** (epic-only, `:239-244`): Present vs Missing measurable done definitions.
**Single-Concern Check** (epic-only, `:246-253`): one-sentence test; structural "and" = two concerns → COMPLEX; incidental "and" = OK.

**Feasibility Review Recommendation** (`:257-264`): `feasibility_review_recommended=true` when `external_boundary_count > 0` OR `pattern_familiarity="low"`.

**Advisory context fields** (NOT used for classification, `:31-38`): `success_criteria_count`, `scenario_survivor_count` — informational only; the agent's own SC count is authoritative for the >6 override; the caller's SC≥7 / survivors≥10 overrides live in `/dso:brainstorm`, not this agent.

**DEPRECATED twin:** `skills/shared/prompts/complexity-evaluator.md` (`:1-3` marks it deprecated/reference-only) is a **5-dimension** rubric (Files/Layers/Interfaces/scope_certainty/Confidence, `:11-98`) with the same thresholds but **no** Dimensions 6–8 and **no** epic qualitative overrides. Adds **Context-Specific Routing** table (`:114-126`): `/dso:sprint` story & epic evaluators escalate MODERATE→COMPLEX; `/dso:debug-everything` de-escalates MODERATE→TRIVIAL; `/dso:preplanning` Phase A maps SIMPLE→implementation-plan, MODERATE→lightweight, COMPLEX→full; `/dso:fix-bug` post-investigation TRIVIAL/MODERATE→fix, COMPLEX→epic. Output enum forbids SIMPLE (`:148`).

---

## PART B — SHARED REVIEW MACHINERY (`skills/shared/`)

**`reviewers/SCORING-SCALE.md`** — universal **1–5 scale** (`:5-12`): 5 Exceptional/production-ready; 4 Strong/minor polish; 3 Adequate/notable gaps; 2 Needs Work/significant issues; 1 Unacceptable/fundamental; N/A.

### `docs/reviewers/` — the 3 brainstorm/epic-scrutiny fidelity reviewers (each scored 1–5, **pass threshold = all dims ≥4**, per epic-scrutiny-pipeline `:311`)

**Agent Clarity reviewer** (`docs/reviewers/agent-clarity.md`, perspective "Agent Clarity"):
9. **self_contained** (`:23`) — planner can decompose into stories w/o clarifying questions.
10. **success_measurable** (`:24-28`) — every SC observable/pass-fail; post-sprint-only measurement must score ≤2; observability tooling is valid.

**Scope reviewer** (`docs/reviewers/scope.md`, perspective "Scope"):
11. **right_sized** (`:23`) — coherent single-sprint unit; too-large/too-small signals enumerated.
12. **no_overlap** (`:24`) — scope differentiated from other milestones.
13. **dependency_aware** (`:25`) — dependencies on other milestones named explicitly.
14. **consumer_completeness** (`:26`) — all Part-C-discovered consumers covered by SCs or descoped; N/A when Part C skipped.

**Value reviewer** (`docs/reviewers/value.md`, perspective "Value"):
15. **user_impact** (`:24`) — named user/stakeholder + observable improvement/business outcome.
16. **validation_signal** (`:25`) — in-session executable validation mechanism; post-deploy-only doesn't satisfy alone; backend internal-only → N/A.

### `prompts/value-effort-scorer.md` — P0–P4 priority assignment (used by brainstorm + roadmap)

17. **value** (1–5, `:39-45`): Minimal / Small QoL / Measurable / Significant / Critical.
18. **effort** (1–5, `:51-59`): Trivial(<1d) / Small(1–3d) / Moderate(1–2wk) / Large(3–4wk) / Multi-sprint.
19. **priority** — Value×Effort → P0–P4 matrix (`:67-103`, exhaustive 25-cell mapping).

### `prompts/complexity-gate.md` — 6 over-engineering gates (PASS/FAIL per GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT block, `:11-24`)

20. **Gate 1 YAGNI** (`:26-39`) — FAIL if feature/abstraction addresses a requirement absent from current story's done definitions.
21. **Gate 2 Rule of Three** (`:40-48`) — FAIL if <3 existing call sites (planned/future don't count).
22. **Gate 3 Dependency Cost/Benefit** (`:50-59`) — FAIL unless inline alt >30 lines OR library gives correctness/security guarantee.
23. **Gate 4 Scale Threshold** (`:61-72`) — perf optimization FAIL without scale estimate (from scale-inference) or measured degradation.
24. **Gate 5 Profiling-First** (`:74-84`) — perf optimization FAIL without cited tool + metric + exceeded threshold; Gates 4+5 both must pass.
25. **Gate 6 LLM Self-Audit** (`:86-96`) — 3-question reflection (no PASS/FAIL; produces rationale).
26. **Sandbagging Prohibition** (`:108-114`) — simple baseline option must be genuinely viable, not a strawman.

### `prompts/verifiable-sc-check.md` — SC drafting gate (brainstorm Phase 2 Step 2)

27. **Session-feasibility self-check** (`:6-30`) — SC must be evaluable in the closing session (repo artifacts / CI of closing PR / local-or-reachable command); else session-infeasible → prohibited.
28. **End-state-only litmus** (`:50-66`) — "could this be false before sprint and true only due to this sprint's work?" → route to Closure Checks (transitions ≠ durable SCs).
29. **Verify-Intent 3-element structure** (`:68-86`) — every non-DEFERRED SC needs Subject + Action + Observable; rejects vague intents.

### `workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md` — gap analysis / scenario / fidelity orchestration

30. **Part A — Artifact Contradiction Detection** (`:30-53`) — user-named artifacts missing from SCs (fuzzy-match rules).
31. **Part B — Technical Approach Self-Review** (`:56-86`) — sync loops, race conditions, assumption invalidation, parsing ambiguities, deprecation/rename reference sweep.
32. **Part B Inference-Signal Scan** (`:65-84`) — hedging + confident-assertion trigger words flag inferred input sources requiring MUST-execute Read/Grep verification.
33. **Part C — Shared Artifact Impact Analysis** (`:88-115`) — file-artifact mode (2+ external consumers / move-rename-remove) + behavioral-prohibition mode (block/prohibit/require…before); emits `covered_by_SC` tuples.
34. **Scenario Analysis complexity scaling** (`:232-242`): ≥5 SC OR integration signal → full; 3–4 SC + no integration → cap 3 scenarios; ≤2 SC → skip. Red-team/blue-team scenario sub-agents (`:244-252`).
35. **Feasibility Review trigger** (`:294-309`) — external integration / first-time internal platform feature; endpoint-granularity rule.
36. **Prompt Alignment / LLM-instruction signal detection** (`:354-405`) — skill/agent/prompt/hook signals → bot-psychologist dispatch.

### `workflows/remediation-loop-protocol.md` — remediation termination/oscillation governance

37. **Oscillation-check hard gate** (`:52-66`) — cycle ≥2 must invoke `/dso:oscillation-check`; same findings recurring → `OSCILLATION_HALT`. Termination tokens: `REPLAN_ESCALATE`/`HALT_FOR_USER`/`OSCILLATION_HALT`/`PROTOCOL_ERROR` (`:24-49`). MAX_CYCLES default 3, min 2 (`:179-185`).

---

## PART C — REVIEWER/CRITIC/EVALUATOR AGENTS

### Code-reviewer family — shared base (lines 1–585, identical in all four `code-reviewer-deep-*`; the two security files share the same heavy base)

**Severity enum** `critical|important|minor|fragile` (`deep-arch.md:181, 250-259`; fragile == important for pass/fail; `suggestion` used as downgrade ceiling). **Category enum** (the 5 scoring dimensions): `correctness|design|hygiene|maintainability|verification` (`:175, 425-434`). **relation taxonomy** `NEW_INTRODUCED|NEW_PRE_EXISTING|RESUSTAIN_OF|REFRAME_OF` (`:438`).

Base dimensions/gates (cite arch, identical in all four + security):
38. **Diff-Boundary Discipline** (`:75-82`). 39. **Verify-Before-Assert** w/ 7 sub-prohibitions: file-existence (`:89`), content claims on unchanged files (`:90`), behavior claims outside diff (`:91`), aliased-import resolution (`:95`), stale-context (`:97`), cross-module function disambiguation (`:99`), same-file/imported symbol resolution (`:101-108`). 40. **File size >500** → minor (important if new file) (`:145`). 41. **Deletion impact analysis** → critical/correctness (`:147-153`). 42. **Caller-input verification gate** (`:221-224`). 43. **Arithmetic verification gate** (`:226`). 44. **reachability** ≥20 non-ws chars for critical/important/fragile (`:211-214`). 45. **cited_excerpt** ≥5 chars (`:204`). 46. **verification_evidence** absence-claim gate (`:209,470`). 47. **Unverified-claim rule** (`:323`). 48. **approach_viability_concern** pattern signal (`:247-248`).
49–54. **Severity Calibration MINOR-not-IMPORTANT floor (6)** (`:265-274`): unused imports; misspellings non-user-facing; redundant blank lines; var-name style non-public; comment formatting; log wording.
55. **Test-Coupling Philosophy 4-condition test** (`:276-292`) → minor ceiling; defect criteria (may be important): 56. **Refactoring violation**, 57. **Tautological assertion**, 58. **Isolation failure**, 59. **Regression blindness** (`:296-299`).
60–66. **Explicit carve-outs (7)** (`:305-311`): moved/renamed w/ callsites; pure formatting; test for existing behavior; trust-boundary on public config (bug 9e84); theoretical injection on `shell=False`/`"${arr[@]}"`; "no test covers edge X" w/o failure path; state-transition test reuse.
67–73. **NOT-Flag Auto-Downgrade (7)** (`:333-353`): mechanical style; unreachable-path error handling; non-public naming; redundant null/bounds checks; comment/docstring formatting; standard bash idioms (3 sub: `\$VAR` in `bash -c`, `func && return 0`, `set -uo pipefail` w/o `-e`); sourced-file functions.
74–80. **Behavioral Testing VALID patterns (7, do NOT flag)** (`:373-399`): observable post-conditions; Rule-5 structural greps on instruction artifacts; greps of command output; table-driven/equivalence/classifier tests; exit-code/signal assertions; external-boundary mocks; coverage-gap demands (suggestion max).
81–85. **Pre-Output 5-Category Coverage Check** (`:444-452`).

### `code-reviewer-standard.md` (opus) — delta dims #59+ (file:line as cited)
Bash correctness: double-quoted vars (`:617`), `set -euo pipefail` (`:619`), pipeline exit codes (`:621`), **no jq → important** (`:623`), explicit exit codes (`:625`). Bash hygiene: arrays (`:631`), `local` (`:632`), mktemp+trap (`:633`). Python correctness: subprocess>os.system (`:638`), `shell=True` important/critical (`:641`), safe deserialization (`:643`), fcntl.flock (`:645`). Python verification: mocked/temp-dir tests (`:649`), assert+both-paths (`:651`). Markdown: qualified `/dso:` refs (`:657`), cross-ref existence (`:660`), heading hierarchy (`:662`), referenced-artifact existence (`:666`). External-ref verification: internal APIs fragile/important (`:824`), bash source pre-check (`:832`), external lib APIs (`:840`), model-IDs/endpoints fragile (`:849`). Full Standard Checklist — Functionality (logic, edge cases, error handling, security, concurrency, efficiency, deletion impact, hook exit codes, `:866-880`); Testing Coverage (test per function, error-path tests, edge cases, meaningful assertions, mock scoping, .test-index registration, RED markers, `:883-894`); Hygiene (dead code, naming, complexity, missing guards, hard-coded, jq-free, no grep/cat primary logic, `:897-909`); Readability/maintainability (intent names, comments, >500-line, style consistency, qualified skill refs, `:912-918`); OO Design (SRP, encapsulation, Open/Closed, interface migration, inheritance vs composition, hook architecture, ticket-event boundary, `:921-934`). **AI Blindspots (all 4)**: domain_mismatch (`:974`), ui_artifacts (`:981`), spaghetti_patching (`:989`), asymmetric_change (`:998`). Overlay: security/performance_overlay_warranted (`:1013-1014`).

### `code-reviewer-light.md` (haiku) — delta #125+
Single-shot, no context-request protocol (`:608`). Linter/shellcheck/type-checker suppression (`:702-711`). Functionality (logic, null deref, swallowed errors, injection, `:644-649`); Bash (`[[ ]]` semantics, quoted vars important, `set -euo pipefail`, validated cmd outputs, `:651-662`); Python (os.system important, bare-except important, subprocess→critical, `:663-671`); Testing (`:673-675`); Hygiene spot-check (`:677-679`); Readability (>500→minor, `:681-684`); OO breaking-signature (`:686-687`); Escalation (severity + factual uncertainty, `:689-696`); only **ui_artifacts** blindspot (`:713-727`). **Finding budget 0–5; >5 = escalate tier** (`:751`).

### `code-reviewer-performance.md` (opus) — delta #159+
8 perf concerns: DB-in-loop/N+1 (`:606`), sequential-could-be-parallel I/O (`:607`), unbounded accumulation (`:608`), over-fetching (`:609`), blocking in async (`:610`), cache stampede (`:611`), unnecessary materialization (`:612`), connection-pool misuse (`:613`). Scrutiny lenses: non-linear complexity O(n²)+ (`:618`), hot paths (`:619`). **Bright-line severity**: "It breaks" → critical; "It scales" → important; fixed-cost → minor (`:625-628`); only critical/important block (`:630`). Hard exclusions (test-only, ruff PERF, micro-opts, theoretical, `:635-638`). Rationalizations to reject (`:646-648`).

### `code-reviewer-test-quality.md` (sonnet) — delta #180+; all findings forced `category=verification` (`:735`)
Behavioral Testing **Rules 1–5** (`:606-610`). 6 detection patterns: P1 change-detector (`:620`, important/minor per 4-criterion), P2 implementation-coupled (`:624`), P3 tautological (`:628`, **always critical**), P4 source-grepping (`:632`, **always critical** except Rule-5 structural-artifact exception `:636-644`), P5 existence-only (`:646`, important sole/minor combined), P6 runtime waste (`:651`, minor; important >10s; flag at >3x). 4-criterion test (refactoring/tautological/isolation/regression, `:671-677`). Remove-not-patch directive (`:690-698`). NOT-Flag exemption override (`:712-722`). Hard exclusions + rationalizations (`:700-729`).

### `code-reviewer-security-red-team.md` (recall-maximizing, no ticket context, `:597`)
8 security criteria: Authorization completeness (`:606`), untrusted-input→sink data-flow (`:607`), fail-open error handling (`:608`), state-machine integrity (`:609`), privilege escalation via indirect paths (`:610`), cryptographic misuse (`:611`), TOCTOU (`:612`), trust-boundary violations (`:613`). Scrutiny lenses: new entry points (`:618`), sensitive-data exposure (`:619`). Hard exclusions (test-only, deterministic-scanner overlap [Bandit/Semgrep/CodeQL], theoretical, `:624-626`). 4 rationalizations to reject (`:636-639`). Field allowlist + bracket-prefix (`:644`).

### `code-reviewer-security-blue-team.md` (context-aware triage, `:597`)
Triage verdicts: **DISMISS** (invalid in context; non-blocking, `:606-611`), **DOWNGRADE** (real-but-lower; blocking if ≥important, `:613-618`), **SUSTAIN** (stands; blocking if ≥important, `:620-625`). 4 triage principles (context-is-weapon; unreviewed→sustained-default; cite-evidence; no re-discovery, `:630-633`). 4 ticket-context uses (`:641-644`). Output severity restricted to critical/important/minor, category always "correctness" (`:650-660`).

### `huge-diff-reviewer-standard.md` (opus, lighter base — no Verify-Before-Assert/NOT-Flag/Behavioral-Testing block). Fragile = dimension score 3 (`:157`).
File-type routing (Bash quoting/strict-mode/pipefail/no-jq-important/exit-codes/arrays/local/mktemp, `:269-285`; Python subprocess/`shell=True`/safe-deser/flock/tests, `:291-304`; Markdown qualified-refs/cross-ref/heading/artifact-existence, `:309-319`). External-ref verification (`:330-350`). Full 5-dim Standard Checklist (`:358-431`, same items as code-reviewer-standard). Escalation + approach_viability (3+ fragile, `:433-454`). Overlay (`:462-463`). Pre-existing→minor (`:473-475`).

### `huge-diff-reviewer-light.md` (lighter base). Tier identity single-pass (`:253`). File-type detection + suppression (`:265-273`). Functionality/Bash/Python/Testing/Hygiene/Readability/OO/Escalation (`:281-331`). Linter suppression (`:339-346`). Overlay (`:352-353`). **0–5 findings ceiling; >5 = escalate** (`:368`).

### `huge-diff-refactor-anomaly.md` (opus)
3 anomaly dims mapped to base 5-category schema: **pattern_conformance** → correctness (`:79-83,108-113`), **behavioral_drift** → design (`:85-89,114-119`), **callsite_completeness** → verification (`:91-95,120-126`). Standard hygiene + maintainability checklists (`:127-136`). Severity enum critical/important/minor/fragile (`:166-170`). Overlay (`:174-179`). 5-category coverage check (`:185-191`).

### `bloat-blue-team.md` (sonnet) — verdicts **CONFIRM | DISMISS | NEEDS_HUMAN** (`:4,19`); rationale_basis `excerpt_only|file_context|cross_file` (`:196-202`)
5 HARD-GATEs: Confidence-Blind Classification (`:23-36`), Asymmetric Error Policy (default DISMISS, `:38-54`), **NEEDS_HUMAN ≤20% / ≥80% definitive** (`:56-69`), Scope Anchoring (`:71-85`), CONFIRM requires `bloat_evidence` sentence (`:87-105`). Trusted-by-default forced-DISMISS patterns: snapshot/golden/property tests P-T1 (`:114-117`), config/env/param/entry-point vars P-C1 (`:120-122`), changelog/legacy/archive docs P-D3 (`:124-126`). Pattern-specific CONFIRM/DISMISS/trap guidance: **P-T1** change-detector (`:210-213`), **P-D3** stale-example-absent-symbol (`:215-218`), **P-C1** feature-flag-never-true (`:220-223`).

### `bloat-resolver.md` (sonnet) — decisions `applied`(action) vs **NO_CHANGE**(category); NO_CHANGE enum **CASCADE_RISK|INSUFFICIENT_CONTEXT|PATTERN_UNCLEAR|STACK_UNCERTAINTY** (`:57-68`); action enum delete_function/delete_file/delete_block/annotate/flag (`:101-110`)
HARD-GATEs: Finality (`:23-34`), Mandatory Dependency/Cascade Check (`:36-52`), NO_CHANGE Categorization (`:54-69`), Green Baseline (`:156-169`), Dynamic-Import/String-Ref Check (`:181-198`), 4-check Self-Review (`:211-225`), Scope Creep Prohibition (`:227-242`). Atomic deletion + bottom-to-top ordering (`:200-209`). Per-pattern removal guidance T1/T2/T3/D2/D4/D5/C1/C2/C3 (`:249-281`).

### `code-reviewer-arbiter.md` (opus) — cycle-end ruling **BLOCK|DEFER|DROP** per finding
**BLOCK-Gate AND-logic** (all 4: severity∈{critical,important}; defense rejected/absent; cycle_num≤max_cycles; impact_class in 8-floor, `:40-47`). CoVe soft-cap (cycle>max → DEFER all critical/important, `:52`). DROP rules (`:58-62`). Enum vocabularies: **cross_reviewer_agreement (4)** UNANIMOUS/MAJORITY/SPLIT/SINGLE_REVIEWER (`:109-114`); **cross_cycle_pattern (7)** NEW_INTRODUCED/RECURRING/RESUSTAIN_OF/RESOLVED_THEN_REINTRODUCED/ESCALATED/DEFENDED_PRIOR_CYCLE/UNKNOWN (`:116-124`); **impact_class (9 = 8-floor + none)** bug/unintended_behavior/security_vulnerability/data_loss_or_corruption/secret_exposure/compliance_violation/api_contract_break/infrastructure_break + none (`:126-136`).

### `code-reviewer-verifier.md` (sonnet) — absence-claim verifier, rulings **confirm|downgrade-to-minor|drop**
Rubric: clear contradiction→drop; authoritative-tone false positive→drop; genuine ambiguity→confirm; scope/severity overstated→downgrade (`:48-58`). Fail-open: never drop on insufficient evidence (`:33`). Fingerprint schema (`:36-46`).

### `completion-verifier.md` (sonnet) — "did we build what spec says?" SC(epic)/DD(story) verdicts PASS|FAIL
Per-criterion classification: **observable-behavior** (requires execution trace; doc/code-inspection insufficient → FAIL) vs **documented-behavior** (Grep/Read/Glob OK) (`:212-216`). FAIL failure_category: external_blocker / internal_architecture_gap / evidence_pending (`:218-221`). **Aspirational Implementation Detection** — 5 signals, any 2 → FAIL (RED stubs; no live-path callers; competing impl; doc contradictions; missing integration artifacts, `:238-245`). Epic-only: Descendant subtree walk (parent_id only; status filter; **open-descendant Closure Checks BLOCK vs WARN**, `:160-203`); Project Closure Hooks / 3 default gates **SC9 coverage ≥100 preventions** / **SC14 FP rate <10%** / **SC13 restart-rate** (`:259-326`); DSO-Story-Merge trailer provenance (`:346-390`). Manual-story sentinel check (`:328-344`). Deferred-evidence obligation tickets regex (`:424-470`). Consumer smoke tests (`:392-422`). Trace-outcome eval table PASS/FAIL/TIMEOUT/SKIP → EVIDENCE_PENDING (`:128-141`). P1 enum PASS|FAIL|BLOCKED|INCONCLUSIVE (`:523`).

### `feasibility-reviewer.md` (sonnet) — perspective "Technical Feasibility"; scored 1–5
17. **technical_feasibility** (`:134-144`): 5 verified … 1 contradicted. 18. **integration_risk** (`:146-157`): 5 no-risk … 1 critical (higher=lower-risk). Integration signal classification verified/partially-verified/unverified/contradicted (`:105-112`). CLI subcommand inventory + command_surface MATCH/MISMATCH/UNVERIFIED (`:52-67,175-188`). Auth HTTPS precondition check (`:114-116`). Critical capability gap → high-risk + spike (`:118-127`).

### `scope-drift-reviewer.md` (sonnet) — fix-bug post-fix gate; drift_classification **in_scope|ambiguous|out_of_scope**
Behavioral-vs-non-behavioral heuristic table (`:70-77`). Per-hunk scope mapping in_scope/ambiguous/out_of_scope (`:91-97`). **Creation-vs-Restoration check** — CREATION signals (new external service calls, new CLI entry points, new user-visible artifacts) → reclassify out_of_scope (`:99-113`). Overall classification rules (`:117-122`). PARSED_SCOPE checkpoint + scope-insufficiency guard (`:36-62`). confidence high/medium/low (`:146-149`).

### `red-team-reviewer.md` (opus) — adversarial story-map review; two modes
**SC→DD Coverage Audit** verdicts: fully_covered / partially_covered / uncovered / out_of_scope_for_stories (`:158-162`); 3-part coverage standard (same outcome / same-or-wider scope / same measurability, `:166-170`). **8-category interaction taxonomy**: sc_coverage_gap + 1. Implicit Shared State (`:190`), 2. Conflicting Assumptions (`:198`), 3. Dependency Gaps (`:206`), 4. Scope Overlaps (`:213`), 5. Ordering/Sequencing Violations (`:220`), 6. Consumer Impact/Operational Readiness (`:227`), 7. Residual References (`:235`). **inference_challenge mode**: inferred-vs-explicit-sourced classification + sampling tiers (always-challenge if gate_verdicts/workflow_completion_checklist; else 20% hash-bucket, `:46-64`).

### `blue-team-filter.md` (sonnet) — filters red-team findings; disposition **accept|reject**
4 filter criteria: Actionable (`:30-35`), Real Cross-Story Interaction (`:37-42`), Distinct from Existing Considerations (`:44-49`), High Confidence (`:51-57`). Fail-open: pass-through when uncertain; extra weight for sc_coverage_gap (`:59-60,107,139`).

### `red-test-evaluator.md` (opus) — RED-writer triage verdicts **REVISE|REJECT|CONFIRM**
CONFIRM 4-condition eligibility (`:109-114`); REVISE eligibility (`:123-133`); REJECT fallback + evaluator-specific criteria: **refactoring survival**, **suite-level value/redundancy** (`:142-147`). INFEASIBILITY_CATEGORY enum infrastructure/injection/documentation/reference_removal (`:184-189`). Runtime budget: **unit test ≤10s ceiling**, >10s → REVISE if restructuring path (`:268-283`). REJECTION_REASON enum (`:101-106`).

### `red-test-writer.md` (sonnet) — generative but with acceptance/rejection rubric
**Rejection Criteria Rubric** STRUCTURAL(rejected) vs BEHAVIORAL(accepted) (`:62-80`); change-detector test #4 (`:69`). Rule 5 instruction-file (section-heading checks only; body-text/existence-only prohibited, `:82-89`); Rule 6 declarative-config validators acceptable (`:91-99`). Change-detector self-check #5 (`:187-188`). REJECTION_REASON enum no_observable_behavior/requires_integration_env/ambiguous_spec/structural_only_possible (`:235-242`).

### `verification-remediation-planner.md` (opus) — 4-branch ordered decision tree
Scope pre-classification IN-STORY / NEW-IN-EPIC / CROSS-EPIC / AMBIGUOUS (`:45-52`). Rule 1 replan_story (in-story zero-evidence, `:54-62`); Rule 2 new_tasks_in_story (all-partial implementation-only; remediation_approach implement_feature vs legitimize_marker, `:64-90`); Rule 3 new_story_in_epic (`:92-103`); Rule 4 replan_epic (cross-epic, `:105-111`); PROTOCOL_ERROR fallthrough (`:113-117`). Tiebreakers T1 (Rule2>Rule3) / T2 (`:121-134`). Confidence HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW (`:137-145`).

### `intent-search.md` (sonnet) — fix-bug intent gate; outcomes intent-aligned/intent-contradicting/ambiguous/intent-conflict
Terminal-outcome table + triggered/confidence (`:127-134`); 7 classification rules (`:136-145`). Caller-traversal behavioral_dependency vs incidental_usage; 3-level cap; TRAVERSAL_CHECKPOINT (`:146-179`).

### `approach-decision-maker.md` (opus) — proposal evaluator, 5 dims scored 1–5
1. Codebase Alignment (`:49-61`), 2. Blast Radius (`:63-73`), 3. Testability (`:75-85`), 4. **Simplicity** (anchored on complexity-gate verdicts; YAGNI/Rule-of-Three, `:87-99`), 5. Robustness (`:101-111`). Context hierarchy (epic SC non-negotiable / story DD required / considerations advisory, `:34-43`). **7 anti-patterns**: golden hammer, premature abstraction, cargo cult, resume-driven, premature optimization, NIH, config-surface proliferation (`:117-125`).

### `approach-proposer.md` (opus) — generates proposals with embedded gates
**Four-axis distinctness gate**: Data layer / Control flow / Dependency graph / Interface boundary (`:86-91`); pair passes if differs on ≥1 axis (`:107-113`). Runs **complexity-gate Gates 1–3** per proposal (`:97-103`). Schema-preservation rules in delta mode (remediation-loop protocol `Schema Preservation — approach-proposer`).

### `bot-psychologist.md` (sonnet) — LLM behavioral debugger
**17-point failure taxonomy** (`:53-69`): Structured Output Collapse, Tool-Calling Schema Drift, Silent Instruction Truncation, Context Flooding, Multi-File State De-sync, Termination Awareness Failure, Multi-Step Reasoning Drift, Verbosity, Sycophancy, Brittle API Mapping, Positional Bias, Non-Deterministic Logic, Phantom Capability Hallucination, Instruction Leaking, Confidence Calibration Failure, Instruction Locality, Pink Elephant Effect. **5 RCA probes** (`:73-79`): Gold Context, Closed-Book, Prompt Perturbation, Sycophancy Probe, State-Check. KERNEL + 20% Rule frameworks (`:43-47`). Pink-Elephant framing audit on every fix (`:111-116`).

### `visual-evaluator.md` (sonnet) — UI screenshot scoring 1–5
5 score dims: **whitespace_balance**, **element_density**, **visual_hierarchy_legibility**, **alignment_grid_adherence**, **intent_match** (per-integer anchor descriptors `:57-83`). Finding severity critical/major/minor/low; bbox_confidence anchored/inferred. **Attribution decision tree**: implementation_drift / design_flaw / mixed / uncertain (`:86-92`); attribution_confidence high/medium/low. Positive-design calibration / false-negative patterns (`:114-124`).

### `conflict-analyzer.md` (sonnet) — merge-conflict classifier
Classification **TRIVIAL|SEMANTIC|AMBIGUOUS** (`:24-56`); confidence **HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW** (`:58-66`). Tie-break-toward-caution rules (`:79`).

### `cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md` (haiku) — 4-tier severity
**benign | consideration | ambiguity | conflict** (`:60-104`); sub-file semantic-overlap qualifier (overlap required for ambiguity/conflict; disjoint = benign merge-order, `:127,144`).

### `bug-classifier-haiku.md` (haiku) — registry-slug classifier
"Unqualified yes without caveats" rule; partial match ≠ match; best-fit + most-specific; `uncategorized` fallback (`:21-56`).

### `plan-review.md` (sonnet) — delegates rubric to `docs/workflows/prompts/plan-review-dispatch.md`
4 dims scored 1–5, VERDICT PASS|REVISE (`plan-review-dispatch.md:9-54`): 1. **Feasibility** (`:12-16`), 2. **Completeness** (`:18-22`), 3. **YAGNI/Overengineering** (incl. config-surface check, `:24-29`), 4. **Codebase Alignment** (`:31-36`). Finding severity critical|major|minor.

### `story-decomposer.md` (opus) — SC-coverage verdict scheme
Coverage verdicts **fully_covered/partial_coverage/uncovered** (`:199-208`); strict 3-condition standard (same outcome/scope/measurability, `:208`); **INVEST** check (`:229`); 2–5 measurable DDs tied to SCs (`:233-235`); DD-superset preservation (`:121`).

### `second-source-verifier.md` (sonnet) — closure-mechanism audit, per-story PASS|FAIL
3 boolean checks: **verifier_used** (P1 field present), **renderer_used** (structured narrative pattern), **gate_enforced** (handoff gate). SECOND_SOURCE_VERDICT PASS|FAIL (`:53-99`). No-benefit-of-doubt (absent=false).

### `schema-correction.md` (haiku) — repairs review-findings JSON (no re-evaluation; not a scorer; listed for coverage).

## COVERAGE INVENTORY — every `agents/` file examined

**Reviewer/critic/evaluator/judge/verifier (dimensions extracted above):** complexity-evaluator, code-reviewer-{standard, light, performance, test-quality, deep-arch, deep-correctness, deep-hygiene, deep-verification, security-red-team, security-blue-team, arbiter, verifier}, huge-diff-reviewer-{standard, light}, huge-diff-refactor-anomaly, bloat-blue-team, bloat-resolver, completion-verifier, feasibility-reviewer, scope-drift-reviewer, red-team-reviewer, blue-team-filter, red-test-evaluator, red-test-writer (rejection rubric), verification-remediation-planner, intent-search, approach-decision-maker, approach-proposer (embedded gates), bot-psychologist, visual-evaluator, conflict-analyzer, cross-epic-interaction-classifier, bug-classifier-haiku, plan-review (→ plan-review-dispatch.md), story-decomposer (SC-coverage), second-source-verifier, schema-correction. **`agents/ci/` = byte-mirror of the 10 top-level code-reviewer files (no new dimensions).**

**Examined, NO review dimensions (generative/diagnostic/non-evaluative):** doc-writer (4-tier doc schema, generative), gov-copy-writer (copy generation), inference-incident-curator (corpus scan/emit), architectural-probe (produces test scaffold; only a Self-Use Compatibility check, no scored dims), task-decomposer (TDD task decomposition; references remediation-protocol schema-preservation already captured), ui-designer (UI generation), and the 11 investigators (investigator-basic/intermediate/intermediate-fallback/advanced-code-tracer/advanced-historical/escalated-code-tracer/escalated-empirical/escalated-history/escalated-web) — all bug-diagnosis (five-whys, hypothesis elimination, fault-tree), not work-product quality reviewers.

## Dimensions the per-skill passes most likely missed (safety-net highlights)
- **complexity-evaluator Dimensions 6–8** (blast_radius `complex_override`, pattern_familiarity, external_boundary_count) + `feasibility_review_recommended` — present ONLY in the agent, not the deprecated shared rubric.
- **value-effort-scorer** value/effort 1–5 + P0–P4 matrix; **plan-review** feasibility/completeness/yagni/codebase_alignment (rubric lives in `docs/`, not a skill).
- **completion-verifier aspirational-implementation 5-signal detector**, descendant Closure-Checks BLOCK/WARN, SC9/SC13/SC14 gates, DSO-Story-Merge trailer provenance, deferred-evidence obligation regex.
- **arbiter's 3 enum taxonomies** (cross_reviewer_agreement 4 / cross_cycle_pattern 7 / impact_class 9-incl-8-floor).
- **bot-psychologist 17-point taxonomy + 5 RCA probes**; **visual-evaluator 5 spatial dims + attribution tree**; **bloat 2-team verdict systems** (CONFIRM/DISMISS/NEEDS_HUMAN; NO_CHANGE 4-category enum); **red-team 8-category interaction taxonomy + SC→DD coverage audit**; **scope-drift creation-vs-restoration**; **conflict-analyzer & cross-epic 3/4-tier severity schemes**; **second-source 3 mechanism booleans**.
